features: Client Reports eye/view action now opens a real selected report preview panel instead of a placeholder toast
Client Reports download action now downloads existing report URLs or generates a client-facing text report when no PDF URL exists
Added selected report right-rail preview with property, address, guard/officer, patrol type, date/time, duration, request, proof count, summary, and included proof status
Added working Client Reports CSV export
Added selected-row styling so the user can see which report is open
Removed placeholder messages saying report preview/download are future features
Preserved v3.0.67 proof upload confirmation and E2E QA behavior
